overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy town. The character moves from a riverside path through covered walkways and construction areas into a bustling market square with timber-framed buildings and various NPCs.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a muddy riverside path next to stone walls and wooden docks

entered.detail: tall gray stone fortification wall with wooden beams
traditional medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
wooden boards laid over muddy ground for walking
calm waterway running alongside the path
simple wooden barrier along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a riverside path bordered by a tall stone curtain wall on the left and a wooden fence along the water. The ground is muddy with scattered wooden planks, and traditional timber-framed houses are visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with canvas awning

events.description: entering covered walkway with canvas awning overhead

agents.ego_description: walking under a canvas awning, passing NPC pedestrians in a narrow covered walkway

notable_agents.action: woman in medieval dress walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tattered canvas roof providing shade over the walkway
thick wooden poles holding up the canvas roof
wooden table with goods under the awning

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a covered walkway with a canvas awning overhead, transitioning from open sky to diffused lighting. The cobblestone path continues under the shelter where several NPCs are walking, including a woman approaching from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open construction yard with wooden crane

events.description: exiting covered area into open construction space with large wooden crane

agents.ego_description: walking past lumber piles and construction materials toward a large wooden crane structure

notable_agents.action: man pushing a wooden wheelbarrow along the path

entered.detail: large wooden lifting apparatus with rope and beam
red brick building with small windows and stone foundation
arched stone passage through the brick building
stacks of cut wooden logs and planks
wooden wheelbarrow loaded with goods

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a construction yard dominated by a large wooden crane. Geralt walks past piles of lumber and a brick building with a stone archway, while a man pushes a cart on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: bustling town market square with multiple vendor stalls

events.description: entering the main market square with numerous vendor stalls and dense crowd
Geralt slows slightly to navigate through dense crowd near market stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through a crowded market square with various vendor stalls and townspeople browsing goods

notable_agents.action: guard in red and white armor standing watch near the stalls
vendor tending to a market stall with goods displayed

entered.detail: canvas tent covering vendor stalls with hanging goods
wooden display table with baskets and merchandise
large multi-story timber building with ornate architecture
railing along a small bridge or elevated walkway
circular stone water well in the market square

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a bustling market square filled with vendor stalls covered in canvas canopies. Geralt navigates through the dense crowd, passing a guard in red and white armor and various townspeople browsing goods, with a large timber-framed town hall visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market alley with wooden external stairs

events.description: moving from open square into narrower shaded alley between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through a darker narrow alley with wooden external stairs and fewer people

entered.detail: rickety wooden staircase attached to the building exterior
weathered stone wall with small windows
shadowed passage leading deeper into the town

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves from the open market into a narrower, shadowed alleyway. The space is enclosed by stone buildings with wooden external stairs on the right, and the lighting becomes noticeably darker as he approaches a tunnel-like passage ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from a quiet riverside path into a bustling town center before descending into a shadowed alley. It begins along a muddy riverside walk bordered by a stone curtain wall and wooden fences, moving forward toward distant timber-framed houses. As the camera enters a covered walkway, the open sky is replaced by the diffused lighting of a canvas awning and the presence of passing pedestrians. The scene then opens into a construction yard featuring a large wooden crane and piles of lumber before expanding further into a crowded market square filled with vendor stalls and a prominent town hall. Finally, the movement shifts away from the bright, open plaza and into a narrow, darkened alleyway enclosed by stone buildings and wooden stairs.
